title: blechnum neglectum
intro: Blechnum neglectum, also known as the rusty water fern or water fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Blechnum neglectum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable remedy for individuals suffering from chronic respiratory conditions. Blechnum neglectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
